summary: Comprehensive testing of sukunaW Gaming Platform completed successfully. All requested features working: Admin login, chest distribution, redesigned Dodge game with WASD controls and progressive difficulty, complete emoji-to-icon replacement. Backend: 35/35 tests passed. Frontend: All major features tested and functional.
passed_tests: Admin login (pseudotamine/synapthys5082_) with isAdmin=true verification
Admin panel access and layout correctly displayed
Admin panel - give chest to user functionality (common, rare, epic types)
Admin panel - chest type dropdown selection working
Admin panel - user management table displaying all users
Dodge game - navigation and page loading
Dodge game - canvas rendering and game initialization
Dodge game - WASD keyboard controls working (W/A/S/D tested)
Dodge game - start game button clickable and functional
Dodge game - enemy mechanics (red squares visible and moving)
Dodge game - game over screen with score and rewards display
Dodge game - speed increase milestones displayed (x1.5 at 50, x2.0 at 100, x2.5 at 150)
No emoji characters found - successfully replaced with lucide-react icons
UI icons display correctly (SVG-based lucide-react icons throughout)
Navigation between all pages working (Главная, Играть, Магазин, Перевод, Профиль, Админ)
Responsive layout and dark theme maintained
Russian language UI consistent throughout application
User authentication and session management working
Admin badge display in navigation header
All backend API endpoints (35/35 tests passed including new chest functionality)
Admin can give chests to users (common/rare/epic types)
Chest opening functionality working correctly
Admin add coins functionality working
User registration and login flows
Game score submission and reward calculation
Shop functionality and inventory management
Transfer system between users
Bonus system (daily/weekly) with proper cooldowns
Profile page with user statistics and purchase history

success_percentage.backend: 100% (35/35 tests passed including new admin chest functionality)
